cases.prompt: 우리 브랜드 로고 만들어줘 — 깔끔한 워드마크 느낌으로

assertions.text: Diagnoses brand values and personality before generating.
Produces 3-5 mark/wordmark/symbol/monogram concept variants, then refines the chosen one.
Enforces AI-slop prevention (max 3 monotone colors, no gradient/emoji/3D, small-size legibility) at the prompt stage.

cases.prompt: Design a symbol mark for my startup and give me export paths

assertions.text: Generates actual PNG concepts via scripts/gen_logo.mjs (Gemini, requires GEMINI_API_KEY).
Guides vectorization (SVG), background removal, and export paths.
